div1.entryFree: Pathetical, a word used by the poet, as it seems, with intentional impropriety, in the sense of pleasing or displeasing in a high degree; striking, shocking: sweet invocation of a child; most pretty and p. LLL I, 2, 103 (Armado's speech). it is a most p. nit, IV, 1, 150 (Costard's speech). the most p. break-promise, As IV, 1, 196.
